query:
WITH claimed AS (
    UPDATE
        account
    SET
        pending_operation_key = $1
    WHERE
        account_id = $2
        AND pending_operation_key IS NULL
    RETURNING
        account_id
),
inserted AS (
    INSERT INTO
        "transaction" (
            operation_key,
            account_id,
            "status",
            allowance_spent_gas,
            allowance_spent_inner
        )
    SELECT
        $1,
        $2,
        'pending'::transaction_status,
        $3,
        $4
    FROM
        claimed
    RETURNING
        operation_key
)
SELECT
    operation_key
FROM
    inserted
